visit: I'm traveling, you see… mind letting an old man rest a bit?
accept: You saved me… I owe you, truly.
death: Whaaa?! My life ends… just from watching short videos?!

visit: How about this, eh? (He flashes a bundle of cash.)
accept: Oh? Did I say I'd give you money? My memory’s been slipping… ho ho ho.
reject: You'll grow old someday too, you know.
death: It’s all… slimy… what… is this…

visit: It hurts… I just want to rest…
I heard my daughter lives in this settlement…
accept: Kindness always comes back around. Remember that.
reject: What goes around comes around. Don’t forget it.

visit: Outta the way, outta the way! The great me is passing through!
reject: You idiot, you fool, you useless scrap! Go get taken out by an android!
death: Dear God… let me be a rich oil baron’s cat in my next life…

visit: Is this the village that only lets handsome men in?
The road ahead was dangerous… could you let me stay here tonight?
accept: You’re a kind one… you saved me.
death: Ahh… that’s it for me… I’m done for…

visit: Nights get cold, you know… mind if I rest here?
accept: Even a withered tree adds to the mountain’s charm, as they say.
reject: Hey… what are you staring at?
death: Ahh… I can… see… someone smiling… over there…

visit: I’m a traveling merchant… I’d like to request a night’s lodging.
accept: A night’s shelter… I’ll repay this debt someday.
reject: In every world, the weak are always the first to be stepped on.

visit: I dropped my belongings on the way… could you help an old man out?
accept: Thank you… you really saved me.
reject: Don’t think you’ll always be the one doing the choosing…
